calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-07-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd. (Add To Dept. 218 Calendar On 4-27-06)
Off Calendar Apr-28-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as ADD On to the regularly scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Rita Howell.
Cecilia Mangoba, Esq. for Plaintiff: Richard Naranjo, also present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Marissa Valdez Cruz.
Matter submitted and taken under submission to determine the amount of Judgment.
Proposed Judgement received in court.

April 28, 2006
Judgment granted as follows:
General Damages $540,518.00
Punitive Damages $30,000.00
Emotional Distress Damages $100,000.00
Prejudgment Interest $55,950.36
Attorney's Fees $38,050.00
Costs $730.00
Judgment signed by Comm. Sue Kaplan.
